title: Simply Home
description: Simply Home: Right-Click Warp: Get home with the power of a single click and a crystal.
body:
Get home safe and sound, no matter where you are in the world, with the Simply Home mod!

With this mod, you can set your home point anywhere in your Minecraft world by sneaking and right-clicking. Your home point is not tied to a specific crystal, so you can set it anywhere you want, at any time.

To warp back to your home point, simply right-click without sneaking. However, there is a cooldown period between warps, so you can't just spam the warp command to get out of sticky situations. The cooldown period also persists through death, so you can't just respawn and warp back to your home point immediately.

 

Features:

  • Set your home point anywhere in the world by sneaking and right-clicking
  • Warp back to your home point at any time by right-clicking without sneaking
  • 10 minute cooldown period prevents from warping too often
  • Cooldown period persists even through death
  • Crystals will glow once you are able to warp again

 

Perfect for:

    • Players who are new to Minecraft and get lost easily
    • Players who want a convenient way to get back to their base
    • Server Owners who do not want players to use commands often and break immersion
